summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Furniva e-commerce platform iteration 3 features. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed for the new features: simplified Master SKU form, Procurement with box details, Returns workflow with mandatory fields modal and undo, Communication checklist read-only with correct order, Create Return button visibility.
seed_data_creation: Used existing TEST-001 Master SKU and created test procurement batches for box details testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features verified working correctly. See feature verification below.

features_tested.2_master_sku_form_simplified: PASS - Form does NOT contain FNSKU, dimensions, weight, cost_price, selling_price. Contains: Master SKU, Product Name, Description, Category, Amazon (Seller SKU, ASIN), Flipkart (Seller SKU, FSN ID), Website SKU
features_tested.3_procurement_modal_box_fields: PASS - Shows Number of Boxes field, dynamically shows per-box Weight (kg) and Dimensions (L×W×H) fields based on num_boxes
features_tested.4_procurement_total_weight_auto_calc: PASS - Total Weight auto-calculates (verified: box_weights=[15.5,12.3,8.2] returns total_weight=36.0)
features_tested.5_returns_pickup_scheduled_mandatory: PASS - Pickup Scheduled status shows mandatory fields modal with Pickup Date required field
features_tested.6_returns_in_transit_mandatory: PASS - Backend validates tracking_number required (returns 400 if missing)
features_tested.7_returns_undo_functionality: PASS - Undo endpoint works, reverts to previous_status, clears previous_status after undo, tracks in status_history with is_undo flag
features_tested.8_returns_status_history: PASS - Status history displayed in detail modal with timestamps and undo indicator (orange icon)
features_tested.9_order_create_return_button: PASS - Create Return Request button visible (orange styled) for orders without existing return
features_tested.10_order_communication_checklist: PASS - Communication Status section is read-only (green/red dots, no checkboxes). Correct order: Order Confirmation Call → Order Confirmation Message Sent → DNP Day 1/2/3 → Dispatch Confirmation → Delivery Confirmation → Installation Confirmation → Review Request
features_tested.11_navigation_sidebar_order: PASS - Sidebar order: Dashboard, Orders, Inventory, Returns, Costing, Channels, Tasks, Analytics, WhatsApp, Team

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/procurement-batches/ - 200 OK (with box details, auto-calc total_weight)
rca_of_issue: No issues found. All features implemented correctly.
